name: magic-animated-list
title: Animated List
author: Magic UI
description: Reveals caller-provided activity items in a finite sequence.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils.
Added a reduced-motion path that reveals all items without scale or timing effects.

modifications.change: Repointed the bundled utility import and added a reduced-motion path that exposes all items immediately without scale transitions.
modifications.reason: Retain the finite sequencing behavior while honoring the user's motion preference.
